title: malabaila graveolens
intro: Malabaila graveolens, also known as the annual rue or desert rue, is a plant species that belongs to the carrot family and is native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Malabaila graveolens include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as its ability to reduce anxiety and stress levels. Malabaila graveolens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and seeds can be used to make herbal preparations, such as creams and salves, for topical application.
